post.description:
Authenticate user with email and password.

Returns user data and JWT token on success.

Register a new user account.

Sends OTP verification email for standard signup.
For invitation signup (is_invitation=true), user is activated immediately.

Verify signup OTP and activate user account.

Returns user data and JWT token on success.

Resend signup OTP verification email.

Rate limited to prevent abuse.

Request password reset OTP.

Sends reset OTP to user's email if account exists.

Verify password reset OTP.

Returns reset token for password update.

Reset user password using reset token.

Requires valid reset token from verify-reset-otp.

Logout current user.

Revokes the current session token.

Authenticate or register user with Google OAuth.

- For new users: Creates account with Google info, skips OTP verification
- For existing users: Logs them in directly
- Returns is_new_user and needs_profile_completion flags

Set password for OAuth user.

Allows users who signed up with Google to add a password
for traditional email/password login.

Complete profile for OAuth user on first login.

Sets up organization and completes user profile with company and phone details.

Check if a subdomain is available for registration.

Returns availability status and suggestions if taken.
The subdomain will be used to access the account at: {subdomain}.fotoshareai.com

get.description:
List workspaces accessible to the current user.

- Owners see all organization workspaces
- Members with Full Access see all workspaces
- Members with Specific Event access only see assigned workspaces

post.description:
Create a new workspace.

The slug is auto-generated from name if not provided.

delete.description:
Delete a workspace.

Only organization owners can delete workspaces.

post.description: Add a team member to a workspace.

delete.description:
Remove a team member from a workspace.

Cannot remove workspace owners.

post.description: Set workspace as active for the current user.

get.description: List all team members in the organization.
Get a team member by ID.

delete.description: Delete a team member. Cannot delete organization owners.

get.description: List all roles available to the organization.

post.description: Create a new role.

put.description: Update a role. System roles cannot be modified.

delete.description: Delete a role. System roles and roles with assigned members cannot be deleted.

get.description: List all available permissions grouped by category.

schema.title: Response List Permissions Api V1 Permissions Get

get.description: List all invitations in the organization.

post.description: Create and send an invitation.
Resend an invitation email.

get.description: Get invitation details for the accept page.

post.description: Accept an invitation and create account.

Get presigned URL for uploading an asset (logo, banner, avatar, etc.).

Use the returned upload_url to PUT the file directly to S3.
After successful upload, call POST /assets/confirm with the asset_id.

The asset_url can be used immediately but will expire in 1 hour.
Call confirm to get a longer-lived URL.

**Supported asset types:**
- logo: Organization/workspace logos
- banner: Event banners or promotional images
- avatar: User avatars or profile pictures
- generic: Other general assets

**Supported content types:**
- image/jpeg
- image/png
- image/webp
- image/svg+xml

Confirm asset upload completed and get permanent URL.

Call this after successfully uploading to the presigned URL.
Returns a long-lived asset URL (30 days).

get.description:
Get asset information by ID or URL.

Returns asset details including URL, type, size, and metadata.
Can accept either the asset_id (S3 key) or the full asset_url.

delete.description:
Delete an asset by ID or URL.

Permanently deletes the asset from S3 storage.
Can accept either the asset_id (S3 key) or the full asset_url.

put.description:
Update an existing asset by ID or URL.

Returns a presigned URL to upload the new file content.
The asset_id remains the same, but the content is replaced.
Can accept either the asset_id (S3 key) or the full asset_url.

post.description: Request email change. Sends OTP to new email.
Verify email change with OTP.
Update password with current password verification.
Request OTP for password reset from settings.
Verify OTP for password reset.
Reset password after OTP verification.
Enable or disable MFA.
